Look away and let the rumor do its work.

Follow the crowd to the last session.
Get what sleep the night leaves you.

Follow Selk into the low quarter.

Let Marka pocket the page for now.

Stay silent and hope dusk moves on.
Stay to the last grain of the hourglass.
Get some sleep before the dawn bell.

State the facts one last time.
Run the sketch back to the chancellor.
Follow her into the low quarter.
Tell her, bag for bag, all of it.

Follow the delegation into the scare.
Stay close through the dripping lull.

Keep your promise and stay silent.

Walk to dusk with the release papers.

Wait out the last of the hourglass.
